# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Technical honesty check

- [ ] I verified that the change does not claim unsupported Windows audio-endpoint behavior

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Logging impact reviewed
- [ ] Beginner-facing docs updated if user workflows changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the diff for accidental secrets or sensitive data
- [ ] I considered failure modes and edge cases
- [ ] I verified the change locally where practical
- [ ] I considered whether the XInput and hardware limitations are documented clearly
